SIATEC1_IA
TableDeleteAll(TABLE_DerechosNomina)
IF HExecuteSQLQuery(BuscaQry, MyConnectionLucca, hQueryWithoutCorrection + hNoBind,
"SELECT U1.Codigo, U1.Renglon, U1.Funcion, (Case When U1.Funcion='Percepcion
' Then P1.Precepcion Else D1.Deduccion End) As Descripcion " + ...
" FROM LUCCA185 U1 Left Join Percepciones P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.CodAmarre and U1.Funcion='Percepcion
' Left Join Deducciones D1 On D1.Codigo=U1.CodAmarre and U1.Funcion='Deduccion'  " + ...
"Where U1.Codigo=" + Usuarios.CODIGO + " Order by U1.Renglon ") = False THEN
Error("HFSQL error: " + HErrorInfo())
END
HReadFirst(BuscaQry)
LOOP (HNbRec(BuscaQry))
TableAddLine(TABLE_DerechosNomina, BuscaQry.Codigo, BuscaQry.Renglon, BuscaQry.Funcion, BuscaQry.
Descripcion)
HReadNext(BuscaQry)
END
